title: Der Prozeß
writer: Rudolf Brunngraber, Kurt Heuser, Emmerich Robenz
actors: Maria Eis, Aglaja Schmid, Marianne Schönauer
plot: In 1882 a country girl disappears from a small Hungarian village. The inhabitants suggest that she was murdered by the Jews. Everything is done to accuse them before the trial. A study in stubbornness, racism and intolerance and h...
